label: Video & Streaming Playback
sample_reviews: ["there should be option to set video quality i really hate automatically changing video quality like I can watch YouTube etc at 720p no buffer but I can't stream on Netflix", 'They took down video "cast" feature! I need to click my profile every time I open my app. We can\'t select a default profile. Need more quality-of-life features!', "cannot stream any series without it buffering for 20 minutes and crashing. cannot watch my downloaded episodes also.. why am I even paying for the subscription if I can't enjoy the available content.", "Its a good streaming platform but I don't understand why you remove movies people atcually watch. Removal of cast support is another straw. 13 wks outside US last year + often cast to TVs in hotels. Don't want 2 set up TV then remove after. Prefer using my phone as a remote v an ugly TV app or new chromecast w/ remote.", "Getting 5.10 error again and again video isn't playable..", "This was one of the apps I opened from time to time.
